title: Connect tasks in different docs to a master task list
excerpt: I want to take notes across documents, log tasks that relate to each document (so I know where it came from and can stay organized), and then see all tasks assigned to me, or my team etc filtered in one place (a task boa…

posts.author: ITU (Deryn)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to take notes across documents, log tasks that relate to each document (so I know where it came from and can stay organized), and then see all tasks assigned to me, or my team etc filtered in one place (a task board).
